Continuity Layer

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Continuity

Migration Safe Sync Ready EXE Future

Cross-Device Persistence and Recovery Foundation

This layer prepares Legalnomics for account continuity, role persistence, laptop change, browser recovery, web sync and future EXE-safe continuity behavior.

Login Continuity

Role-linked user continuity through secure authentication and persistent access.

Case Data Recovery

Prepare all cases, hearings, notices and intake records for recoverable storage flow.

Device Migration Logic

Allow future account re-login from new device without operational data loss.
